hero.headline: Dr. MGR Online MBA in Finance Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved 2-year programme | NAAC A+ accredited | Rs 1,36,000 - Rs 1,41,000 total fee | Deemed University since 2003

sections.tldr: Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute Online MBA in Finance Management covers Security Analysis and Portfolio Management, Merchant Banking and Financial Services, and Banking and Insurance Management in Sem 3. Common core in Sem 4 includes Digital Marketing, International Business Management, Contemporary Seminar, and Field Work and Project Work (8 Weeks). Total fee Rs 1,36,000 to Rs 1,41,000 across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through the university. NAAC A+ accredited, UGC-DEB approved, Deemed University.

about.body:
Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute is a Deemed University in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, named after former Chief Minister Dr. M.G. Ramachandran. The institution has operated under UGC recognition since 2003 and holds NAAC A+ accreditation with UGC-DEB approval for online programmes.

The Finance Management specialisation concentrates its finance depth in Semester 3 with three dedicated courses: Security Analysis and Portfolio Management, Merchant Banking and Financial Services, and Banking and Insurance Management. Semester 4 shares common core subjects across all MBA specialisations, including an 8-week mandatory Field Work and Project Work component.

At Rs 1,36,000 to Rs 1,41,000 total, the Dr. MGR Online MBA sits in the mid-range fee bracket for NAAC A+ online MBAs. The university's healthcare heritage (Dr. MGR founded multiple medical institutions) gives it strong institutional credibility in Tamil Nadu. The 8-week field project is a differentiator: most online MBA programmes cap project work at 4-6 weeks.

EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Semesters 1-2 cover the common MBA core. Semesters 3-4 below show the Finance Management specialisation subjects. Finance Management Sem 4 shares common core subjects. The finance depth is concentrated in Sem 3 with three dedicated finance courses.

subjects.name: Security Analysis and Portfolio Management
subjects.desc: Equity valuation methods, bond pricing, Modern Portfolio Theory, CAPM application, and risk-adjusted performance measurement.

subjects.name: Merchant Banking and Financial Services
subjects.desc: IPO management, underwriting process, SEBI compliance for merchant bankers, and financial advisory services in India.

subjects.name: Banking and Insurance Management
subjects.desc: Commercial banking operations, NPA management, insurance product design, IRDA regulations, and bancassurance distribution.

subjects.name: Strategic Management
subjects.desc: Competitive strategy frameworks, industry analysis, corporate-level strategy, and strategic implementation processes.

subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
subjects.desc: Startup ideation, business plan creation, funding strategies, MSME support systems, and entrepreneurial risk management.

subjects.name: Management Accounting
subjects.desc: Cost-volume-profit analysis, budgetary control, standard costing, variance analysis, and management decision-making tools.

subjects.name: Production and Operations Management
subjects.desc: Production planning, quality management, facility layout, capacity planning, and operations scheduling.

subjects.name: Skill Development
subjects.desc: Communication skills, presentation techniques, team management, and professional development modules.

subjects.name: Summer Project
subjects.desc: Industry-linked summer project requiring field research, data collection, and structured report submission.

subjects.name: Digital Marketing
subjects.desc: SEO, SEM, social media marketing, content strategy, email marketing, and digital analytics tools.

subjects.name: International Business Management
subjects.desc: Global trade frameworks, foreign exchange management, international marketing, and cross-border business strategy.

subjects.name: Contemporary Seminar
subjects.desc: Student-led seminar on current business topics. Requires research, presentation, and peer discussion.

subjects.name: Field Work and Project Work (8 Weeks)
subjects.desc: Mandatory 8-week field project with an organization. Requires structured report, data analysis, and viva voce defence.

whoHires.body:
Dr. MGR MBA Finance Management graduates target roles across banking, corporate finance, and financial services:

**Industries:** Commercial banking, NBFC, insurance, mutual funds, corporate treasury, equity research, financial consulting, and government finance

**Entry-level roles:** Financial Analyst, Credit Analyst, Banking Officer, Portfolio Associate, Insurance Underwriter, Treasury Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Finance Manager, Credit Manager, Branch Manager (banking), Portfolio Analyst, Investment Advisor, Financial Controller

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CFO (mid-market), VP Finance, Head of Treasury, Director of Credit Risk, AVP Corporate Finance

**Employers:** Banks (SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Indian Bank, City Union Bank), NBFCs (Bajaj Finance, Shriram Finance), insurance companies (LIC, Star Health), IT/ITES finance teams, and Chennai/Tamil Nadu regional corporates.

**Note:** Dr. MGR's Deemed University status and NAAC A+ grade carry strong recognition in Tamil Nadu and South India. The 8-week field project adds practical exposure.

skills.body:
The Finance Management specialisation builds skills across capital markets, banking, and insurance:

**Technical skills:**
- Security Analysis: equity valuation (DCF, PE ratio, PBV), bond pricing, yield curve interpretation, and portfolio construction using MPT
- Merchant Banking: IPO process management, SEBI regulatory compliance, underwriting mechanics, and deal advisory fundamentals
- Banking and Insurance: credit appraisal, NPA classification, insurance product structuring, IRDA compliance, and bancassurance models

**Applied skills:**
- Portfolio Management: risk-adjusted return calculation (Sharpe ratio, Treynor ratio), asset allocation strategy, and portfolio rebalancing
- Management Accounting: cost analysis for financial decision-making, budgetary control, and variance interpretation

**Soft skills:** Presenting investment recommendations, client relationship management in banking, insurance advisory communication, and financial report writing for non-finance stakeholders.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Dr. MGR Online MBA Finance Management against peer programmes:

**vs Vignan Online MBA Finance (Rs 90,000):** Vignan is Rs 46,000 to Rs 51,000 cheaper. Vignan has fintech and corporate valuation as standalone subjects. Dr. MGR has merchant banking and banking/insurance as standalone courses. Vignan wins on fee. Dr. MGR wins on Chennai/TN regional brand and the mandatory 8-week field project.

**vs Kurukshetra University Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,02,000):** Kurukshetra is a state university at Rs 34,000 to Rs 39,000 less. Both are UGC-DEB approved. Kurukshetra has strong North India (Haryana/NCR) recognition. Dr. MGR is stronger in Tamil Nadu and South India. Choose based on your regional career focus.

**vs SMU Online MBA Finance (Rs 1,20,000):** SMU at Rs 1,20,000 is Rs 16,000 to Rs 21,000 cheaper with the Manipal group brand and established pan-India placement infrastructure. SMU wins on national brand recognition. Dr. MGR has NAAC A+ (same tier) and the 8-week field project advantage.

fees.body:
The Dr. MGR Online MBA in Finance Management is priced between Rs 1,36,000 and Rs 1,41,000 total across 4 semesters (2-year programme). Fee range varies slightly by specialization - contact our counsellor for the exact figure for your chosen track.

**Payment breakdown**:
- **Per semester**: Rs 34,000 - Rs 40,000 across 4 semesters
- **Full upfront option**: Rs 1,36,000 - Rs 1,41,000 one-time

**Additional charges**:
- Registration fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time, non-refundable at admission)

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute starting Rs 5,700 per month. No external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Dr. MGR Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees for Finance Management with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive an MBA degree certificate with Finance Management as the specialisation, issued by Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute (Deemed University) under UGC-DEB online mode standards.

The degree carries NAAC A+ accreditation, UGC-DEB approval, and Deemed University status since 2003. Valid for government recruitment, PSU finance roles, banking promotions, and private-sector corporate finance positions. DigiLocker issuance is standard.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Dr. MGR Online MBA Finance Management students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Karthik
items.liked: Strong Chennai/Tamil Nadu recognition. The Deemed University tag since 2003 carries weight with South Indian employers and government departments
items.disliked: Semester 4 has no finance-specific subjects. All the finance depth is in Sem 3 only
items.body: I chose Dr. MGR because the brand is well-known in Tamil Nadu. NAAC A+ at this fee is reasonable. The three Sem 3 finance courses (security analysis, merchant banking, banking/insurance) cover the essentials. The 8-week field project forced real-world application. Main gap: Sem 4 is entirely common core, so the finance depth feels front-loaded.

items.name: Lakshmi
items.liked: Merchant Banking and Financial Services subject covered IPO mechanics and SEBI compliance at a practical level useful for my role at a financial advisory firm
items.disliked: Pan-India brand recognition outside Tamil Nadu and South India is limited compared to Manipal or Amity
items.body: The fee is mid-range for NAAC A+. Not the cheapest, not the most expensive. The finance curriculum in Sem 3 is solid. Banking and Insurance Management was directly relevant to my work. The 8-week project is longer than most online MBA programmes and the viva voce adds accountability. For Tamil Nadu candidates, Dr. MGR is a safe choice. For North India careers, consider universities with stronger national brand.

items.name: Suresh
items.liked: Security Analysis and Portfolio Management covered MPT and CAPM with enough depth for entry-level equity research preparation
items.disliked: LMS could be more modern. Some study materials feel dated. Faculty responsiveness varies
items.body: At Rs 1.36-1.41L the value is acceptable but not exceptional. Vignan and Kurukshetra offer similar NAAC-grade programmes at lower fees. Dr. MGR's strength is the Tamil Nadu brand and the 8-week project. If you are based in TN or South India, the regional recognition helps. If national brand is your priority, the fee-to-brand ratio may not work.

faqs.question: Is Dr. MGR a Deemed University?
faqs.answer: Yes. Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute has operated as a Deemed University under UGC recognition since 2003. Named after former Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Dr. M.G. Ramachandran.

faqs.question: What is the fee difference between Rs 1.36L and Rs 1.41L?
faqs.answer: The total fee varies slightly by specialization. Contact our counsellor to confirm the exact fee for Finance Management before making any payment.

faqs.question: Is Dr. MGR Online MBA UGC-DEB approved?
faqs.answer: Yes. Dr. MGR Educational and Research Institute is UGC-DEB approved for online programmes. The degree is legally equivalent to a campus MBA under UGC 2020 guidelines.

faqs.question: Why does Sem 4 have no finance-specific subjects?
faqs.answer: Finance Management concentrates its specialisation depth in Sem 3 with three dedicated finance courses. Sem 4 covers common core subjects (Digital Marketing, International Business Management, Contemporary Seminar) plus the mandatory 8-week Field Work and Project Work.

faqs.question: What is the 8-week Field Work and Project Work?
faqs.answer: A mandatory 8-week field project in Sem 4 requiring attachment with an organization, structured data collection, analysis, report submission, and viva voce defence. This is longer than the 4-6 week projects at most online MBA programmes.

chooseIf: You are based in Tamil Nadu or South India where Dr. MGR's Deemed University brand carries strong recognition.
NAAC A+ at a mid-range fee (Rs 1.36-1.41L) fits your budget and accreditation requirement.
The 8-week mandatory field project matters for hands-on learning.
Security analysis, merchant banking, and banking/insurance as dedicated Sem 3 courses match your career goals.
consider: Vignan at Rs 90,000 or Kurukshetra at Rs 1,02,000 offer NAAC A+ finance MBAs at lower fees.
SMU at Rs 1,20,000 has stronger pan-India brand recognition with the Manipal group backing.
Sem 4 has no finance-specific subjects. If you want finance depth across both semesters, check Vignan or SMU.
National brand recognition outside Tamil Nadu is limited. For North India careers, consider Manipal, Amity, or CU.
